节点.描述: 模块头结点，源自 @kit 注释

节点.功能描述: Provides interfaces to manage power.

Shuts down the system.

This method requires the ohos.permission.REBOOT permission. reason parameter must be of type string.
注释信息: @param { string } reason Indicates the shutdown reason.
@throws { BusinessError } 201 - Permission verification failed. The application does not have the permission required to call the API.
@throws { BusinessError } 202 - Permission verification failed. A non-system application calls a system API.
@throws { BusinessError } 401 - Parameter error. Possible causes: 1. Incorrect parameter types;
@throws { BusinessError } 4900101 - Failed to connect to the service.

error_codes.description: Permission verification failed. The application does not have the permission required to call the API.
Permission verification failed. A non-system application calls a system API.
Parameter error. Possible causes: 1. Incorrect parameter types;
Failed to connect to the service.

节点.功能描述:
Restarts the system.

This method requires the ohos.permission.REBOOT permission. after the restart. If the parameter is not specified, the system enters the normal mode after the restart.
注释信息: @param { string } reason Indicates the restart reason. For example, "updater" indicates entering the updater mode

parameters.说明: Indicates the restart reason. For example, "updater" indicates entering the updater mode

节点.功能描述:
Restarts the system.

This method requires the ohos.permission.REBOOT permission. after the restart. If the parameter is not specified, the system enters the normal mode after the restart. reason parameter must be of type string.
注释信息: @param { string } reason Indicates the restart reason. For example, "updater" indicates entering the updater mode
@throws { BusinessError } 201 - Permission verification failed. The application does not have the permission required to call the API.
@throws { BusinessError } 202 - Permission verification failed. A non-system application calls a system API.
@throws { BusinessError } 401 - Parameter error. Possible causes: 1. Incorrect parameter types;
@throws { BusinessError } 4900101 - Failed to connect to the service.

parameters.说明: Indicates the restart reason. For example, "updater" indicates entering the updater mode

节点.功能描述: Checks whether the screen of a device is on or off.
注释信息: @param { AsyncCallback<boolean> } callback Returns true if the screen is on; returns false otherwise.

parameters.说明: Returns true if the screen is on; returns false otherwise.

节点.功能描述: Checks whether the screen of a device is on or off.
注释信息: @returns { Promise<boolean> } Returns true if the screen is on; returns false otherwise.
节点.return_description: Returns true if the screen is on; returns false otherwise.

节点.功能描述:
Checks whether the device is active.

The screen will be on if device is active, screen will be off otherwise.
注释信息: @returns { boolean } Returns true if the device is active; returns false otherwise.
@throws { BusinessError } 4900101 - Failed to connect to the service.
节点.return_description: Returns true if the device is active; returns false otherwise.

error_codes.description: Failed to connect to the service.

节点.功能描述: Wakes up the device to turn on the screen. detail parameter must be of type string.
注释信息: @param { string } detail Indicates the detail information who request wakeup.
@throws { BusinessError } 202 - Permission verification failed. A non-system application calls a system API.
@throws { BusinessError } 401 - Parameter error. Possible causes: 1. Incorrect parameter types;
@throws { BusinessError } 4900101 - Failed to connect to the service.

parameters.说明: Indicates the detail information who request wakeup.

error_codes.description: Permission verification failed. A non-system application calls a system API.
Parameter error. Possible causes: 1. Incorrect parameter types;
Failed to connect to the service.

节点.功能描述: Suspends the device to turn off the screen.
注释信息: @param { boolean } isImmediate Indicates whether suspend the device immediately.
@throws { BusinessError } 202 - Permission verification failed. A non-system application calls a system API.
@throws { BusinessError } 401 - Parameter error. Possible causes: 1. Parameter verification failed.
@throws { BusinessError } 4900101 - Failed to connect to the service.

parameters.说明: Indicates whether suspend the device immediately.

error_codes.description: Permission verification failed. A non-system application calls a system API.
Parameter error. Possible causes: 1. Parameter verification failed.
Failed to connect to the service.

节点.功能描述: Obtains the power mode of the current device. For details, see {@link DevicePowerMode}.
注释信息: @returns { DevicePowerMode } The power mode {@link DevicePowerMode} of current device .
@throws { BusinessError } 4900101 - Failed to connect to the service.
节点.return_description: The power mode {@link DevicePowerMode} of current device .

error_codes.description: Failed to connect to the service.

节点.功能描述: Obtains the power mode of the current device. For details, see {@link DevicePowerMode}. the DevicePowerMode type is an enumeration class.
注释信息: @param { DevicePowerMode } mode Indicates power mode {@link DevicePowerMode} to set.
@param { AsyncCallback<void> } callback Indicates the callback of setting the power mode.
@throws { BusinessError } 201 – Permission verification failed. The application does not have the permission required to call the API.
@throws { BusinessError } 202 - Permission verification failed. A non-system application calls a system API.
@throws { BusinessError } 401 - Parameter error. Possible causes: 1. Parameter verification failed.
@throws { BusinessError } 4900101 - Failed to connect to the service.

parameters.说明: Indicates power mode {@link DevicePowerMode} to set.
Indicates the callback of setting the power mode.

error_codes.description: Permission verification failed. A non-system application calls a system API.
Parameter error. Possible causes: 1. Parameter verification failed.
Failed to connect to the service.

parameters.说明: Indicates power mode {@link DevicePowerMode} to set.
